title: Analyzing RNA-Seq Data from Chlamydia with Super Broad Transcriptomic Activation
author: Li, Wei Vivian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This repository contains the R scripts to reproduce the analysis in "Analyzing RNA-Seq Data from Chlamydia with Super Broad Transcriptomic Activation: Challenges, Solutions, and Implications for Other Systems".
